rulings.Case Title: TODD HAAS VS. JOHN WAI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 14, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT JOHN WAI's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny motion to strike complaint, sufficient allegation re punitive. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMERICA PRADO GUERRERO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY HEUER et al VS. KATHERINE ROBERTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Reconsideration Of Order Awarding Post-Judgment Attorneyes Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 14, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT KATHERINE ROBERTS' Moiton For Reconsideration Of Order Awarding Post-Judgment Attorneyes Fees. Deny, failed to sustain burden per 1008. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY HEUER et al VS. KATHERINE ROBERTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment Creditors For Post-Judgment Attorney'S Fees
